name: Card Counting Blackjack
description: Six-deck blackjack with Hi-Lo counting: size bets from the true count, play Illustrious-18 deviations, and keep running/true counts accurate. Interactive replay on GitHub Pages.

binding_vow.description: You are a card counter at a 6-deck shoe table (75% penetration reshuffle). Dealer stands on soft 17; blackjack pays 3:2; double on first two cards only; splits allowed; insurance vs Ace. Each step submit JSON with bet_size, action (hit/stand/double/split/insurance/none), running_count, and true_count. Maximize bankroll over up to 35 decisions using Hi-Lo (+1 for 2-6, 0 for 7-9, -1 for 10-A) and bet Table Min × max(1, floor(true count)) when TC ≥ 1.

observation_space.description: { phase, bankroll, table_min, cards_remaining, player_hands, dealer_upcard, dealer_hole_hidden, ground_truth_running_count, ground_truth_true_count, optimal_bet_hint, valid_actions, message }

action_space.description: { bet_size: int, action: hit|stand|double|split|insurance|none, running_count: number, true_count: number }

reward.description: Bet sizing match + strategy (+1 optimal, -0.5 suboptimal, -5 illegal) + count drift penalties
